block.header: simogare no sidariyanagwi no
akikaze no pinikyeni pukeba midukukwino
kamukazeno ise no kuni ni mo aramasi wo
siratuyu to aki no pagwi to pa
udikapa wo pune watase wo to
wa ga yanagwi midori no ito ni naru made ni minaku uretami kakete kumitari
akikaze no pinikyeni pukeba midukukwi no
yamato nite ware pa kwopwimu na kwi no kuni no sapika no umi no oki tu sima no two
imo ga pimo toku to musubite tatuta yama miwatasu nopye no momiti kyeraku pa
imo ga na pa tiyo ni nagaremu pimyesima no kwomatu ga yeda ni koke musu madeni
miti no pye no itisi no para no sirotape no itisirwoku si mo are kwopwimye ya mo
pisakata no amayuku tukwi wo ami ni sasi wa ga opokimi pa kinugasa ni seri
ka ni kaku ni mono pa omopazi pwidapito no
mimaku pori wa ga mopu kimi mo aranaku ni nani ni ka kikyemu uma tukarasi ni

sentence.transcription: nani ni ka ki kye mu

block.header: mimaku pori a ga mopu kimi mo sugwinikyeri nani ni ka kikyemu uma tukarasi ni

sentence.transcription: nani ni ka ki kye mu

block.header: imasara ni nani ka omopamu ukanabiku kokoro pa kimi ni yorinisi monowo
kasugayama mine kogu pune no yakusitera apadinosima no karasuki no pyera
patapoko ni swopite noboreru napa no goto swopite noboreru patapoko no
patapoko ni swopite noboreru napa no goto swopite noboreru patapoko no goto
emisi wo pidari momo na pito pito pa ipedomo tamukapi mo sezu
osaka naru emisi wo pidari momo na pito pito pa ipedomo tamukapi mo sezu
akatoki to tori mo naku nari teratera no kane mo toyominu ake idenu ko no ywo

sentence.transcription: ake ide nu ko no ywo

block.header: ko no nasi wo uwete oposaba kasikokemu
mimasi suru woka ni kage nasi ko no nasi wo uwete oposite kage ni yokyemu mo

sentence.transcription: kage ni yo kye mu mo

block.header: siranamino pamamatu ga ye no tamukekusa ikuyo madeni ka tosi no penikyemu

sentence.transcription: tosi no pe ni kye mu

block.header: miyosino wo yosi to yoku mite yosi to ipisi yoki pito yosino yoki pito yoku mi

sentence.transcription: yo si to yo ku mite
yo ki pito yo ku mi

block.header: nezumi no ipye yone tuki purupi kwi wo kirite piki kiri idasu yotu to ipu ka swore

sentence.transcription: yo tu to ipu ka swore

block.header: sirakumo no tanabiku yama pa miredo akanu kamo tadu naraba asa tobikwoyete yupubye komasi wo
okitutori kamo tuku sima ni wa ga winesi imo pa wasurezi yo no kotogoto ni
amye naru ya ototanabata no unagaseru tama no misumaro misumaro no anatama pa yami tani putawataru adisuki no kamwi

amakumo no kage sape miyuru komoriku no patuse no kapa nwo uranami ka pune no yorikonu iswonami ka ama mo turi senu yosi we ya si ura pa naku tomo yosi we ya si iswo pa naku tomo oki tu nami kiyoku kogiriko ama no turipune

comment.raw: multi-sentence,IP-MAT,0@阿麻俱母能可気佐倍美由留,*
multi-sentence,IP-MAT,IP-ADV,NP-SBJ,PP,NP,1@己母利俱能婆都勢能可婆努,*
multi-sentence,IP-MAT,IP-ADV,NP-SBJ,2@宇羅那美可不祢能与利己努,*
multi-sentence,IP-MAT;@2,3@伊蘇那美可阿麻母都利勢努,*
multi-sentence,CP-FINAL,4@与旨恵夜旨宇羅婆那俱等母,*
multi-sentence,CP-FINAL,IP-SUB,5@与旨恵夜旨伊蘇婆那俱等母,*
multi-sentence,CP-FINAL,IP-SUB,6@於岐都那美岐与俱己岐利己,*

sentence.kanji: 阿麻俱母能可気佐倍美由留
sentence.transcription: ama kumo no kage sape mi yuru

sentence.kanji: 己母利俱能婆都勢能可婆努
sentence.transcription: komori ku no patuse no kapa nwo

sentence.kanji: 宇羅那美可不祢能与利己努
sentence.transcription: ura na mi ka pune no yori ko nu

sentence.kanji: 伊蘇那美可阿麻母都利勢努
sentence.transcription: iswo na mi ka ama mo turi se nu

sentence.kanji: 与旨恵夜旨宇羅婆那俱等母
sentence.transcription: yosi we ya si ura pa na ku tomo

sentence.kanji: 与旨恵夜旨伊蘇婆那俱等母
sentence.transcription: yosi we ya si iswo pa na ku tomo

sentence.kanji: 於岐都那美岐与俱己岐利己
sentence.transcription: oki tu nami kiyo ku kog iri ko

block.header: amakumo no kage sape miyuru komoriku no patuse no kapa nwo uranami ka pune no yorikonu iswonami ka ama mo turi senu yosi we ya si ura pa naku tomo yosi we ya si iswo pa naku tomo oki tu nami kiyoku kogiriko amapune no tomo

sentence.transcription: ama kumo no kage sape mi yuru

block.header: adusayumi pikitu no pe n aru nanoriswo mo pana pa saku made imo apanu kamo
adusayumi pikitu no pe n aru nanoriswo ga pana no saku made imo ni apanu ka
akiyama no momiti pazimuru siratuyu no itisiroki made imo ni apanu kamo
awoniyosi narayamagapi yo sirotape ni ko no tanabiku pa parukasumi nari
kaze pukeba kumo no kinugasa tatutayama ito nipopaseru asagapo ga pana
sipo miteba irinuru iswo no kusa na rasi miru pi sukunaku kwopuru yo opomi
akipagwi pa sakite tiru rasi kasugano ni naku naru sika no kowe wo kanasimi
minasoko pye siduku siratama ta ga yuwe ni kokoro tukusite wa ga omopanaku ni
